zh.lifeSummary: Cecelia De Fulford是Robert De Fulford的女兒，出生。她和Ranulph De Meschines至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Cecelia De Fulford是Robert De Fulford的女儿，出生。她和Ranulph De Meschines至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fulford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named in Devon, such as Fulford in Tiverton, Great Fulford in Dunsford, Fullaford in High Bray, Fulford Bridge in Shebbear, Fullaford in Sampford Courtenay, and Fullaford in Buckfastleigh.

habitational name from one or more of the various places so called elsewhere in England, such as Fulford (Staffordshire), Fulford in Kingston Saint Mary (Somerset), Gate Fulford and Water Fulford (both East Yorkshire), Fulfords Farm in Itchingfield (Sussex), and Fulforth in Witton Gilbert (Durham). All places in 1 above and 2 are named from Old English fūl ‘dirty, muddy’ + ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: Cecelia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

en.lifeSummary: Cecelia De Fulford was born as the daughter of Robert De Fulford. She had at least 1 son with Ranulph De Meschines.

fr.lifeSummary: Cecelia De Fulford est née, fille de Robert De Fulford. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Ranulph De Meschines.

de.lifeSummary: Cecelia De Fulford wurde, als Tochter von Robert De Fulford geboren. Sie hatte mit Ranulph De Meschines mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Cecelia De Fulford è nata il come figlia di Robert De Fulford. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Ranulph De Meschines.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecelia De FulfordはRobert De Fulfordの娘として生まれた。彼女はRanulph De Meschinesとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecelia De Fulford(은)는 Robert De Fulford의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Ranulph De Meschines(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Cecelia De Fulford nasceu filha de Robert De Fulford. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Ranulph De Meschines.

ru.lifeSummary: Cecelia De Fulford родилась. Её отца звали Robert De Fulford. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Ranulph De Meschines.

es.lifeSummary: Cecelia De Fulford nació como hija de Robert De Fulford. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Ranulph De Meschines.
